item.title: Just flew first class for the first time!
item.description: Booked a job that flew me out in style, so got to experience the other side as a secret poor. FP edit - thanks for the positivity ya’ll, world’s seeming kinda dark all over so hopefully this post brought some good clean fun into ya day.
item.dc:creator: everythingiscomingupmilhouse

item.title: David Beckham gives his Instagram account to a Ukrainian doctor
item.description: David Beckham has given a Ukrainian doctor working in the city of Kharkiv control of his Instagram account, which has 71.4 million followers, so she can highlight the work of her medical staff during the war. Kharkiv, Ukraine's second largest city, has been the target of Russian attacks for some three weeks. Article: https://uk.news.yahoo.com/ukrainian-doctor-takes-over-control-185437033.html Instagram account: https://www.instagram.com/davidbeckham/
item.dc:creator: CiaranMcHale

item.title: Omg it was him
item.description: So I work at a tiny Swedish supplier to automotive industries. As I got lunch today at work, by the salad bar in the canteen, I noticed a guy looking very much like Keanu Reeves. Chuckling about it as I sat down by my colleagues, “It must be fun looking like Keanu Reeves”, I said. And yeah, it was him. He’s apparently involved in a motorcycle company, which we supply. I was too star struck to get any real work for the rest of the day. I didn’t want to bother him (celebs should have their privacy), but others that worked with him said he was a super nice guy, really down to earth. Still a bit shocked he showed up here of all places.
item.dc:creator: superapan

item.title: Keanu Reeves Went Out Of His Way To Make An 80-YO Fan’s Day: “Give Her A Call”
item.description:
Keanu Reeves has a reputation for being the nicest man in Hollywood — totally free of pretension and incredibly generous with his time and money. So it makes sense that he would go out of his way to make an 80-year-old grandmother’s day special.
More in the sauce: https://themotherofallnerds.com/keanu-grandma-call/
item.dc:creator: moyanerd

item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Because I'm a fucking adult
item.description: This past year or 2 has been well worth it. I got out of a bad relationship and pretty much lived at work. It's been easy because I drive a truck cross country but I haven't taken any time off. I've had 5 days off this last year and 3 the year before. Friday I moved in to my own apartment and have been waiting all weekend for come furniture to arrive. Today I break my record of consecutive days off. Currently at day 3. I'm sitting in my own couch, enjoy a home cooked meal of chicken nuggets, and drinking whiskey and coke. Now to see what all this nonsense about Elden Ring is about. TL;DR: I'M A FUCKING ADULT DOING ADULT SHIT.
item.dc:creator: IPNBottless

item.title: Nothing fiercer than Babas on a mission
item.dc:creator: heroofourtime

item.title: Carefully curated, easily-read Ukraine news with sources, for those lacking time but want to stay informed.
item.description:
President Biden is going to Europe to attend. The summit is to hear the 7 (and counting) NATO countries that are proposing NATO peacekeeping operations in UKRAINE. The countries in Denmark, Slovenia, Czechia, Lithuania, Latvia, and Estonia, led by Poland, who is particularly foaming at the mouth to defend Ukraine – and with damned good reason; they know a thing or three about Russian invasions. https://www.ukrinform.ua/rubric-polytics/3435471-bajden-obgovorit-vvedenna-mirotvorciv-v-ukrainu-pid-cas-vizitu-do-polsi.html https://notesfrompoland.com/2022/03/18/poland-to-call-for-peacekeeping-mission-in-ukraine-at-nato-summit/ The U.S. makes it clear that regardless of what NATO decides, U.S. allows for other NATO members to conduct operations in/with Ukraine without NATO consensus or invoking any other clauses. https://www.pravda.com.ua/news/2022/03/21/7333210/ https://tvpworld.com/59115871/we-are-ready-to-send-a-peacekeeping-mission-to-ukraine-denmark-def-min https://www.polskieradio.pl/395/7989/Artykul/2922456,Denmark-ready-to-send-troops-to-peacekeeping-mission-in-Ukraine-report SPECULATION: The strongest NATO countries (U.S. and France) will not directly get involved at this time. Poland's proposal will probably result in NATO affirming the U.S.'s stance that member states can help defend Ukraine of their own volition. The Polish-led coalition will probably begin operations, backed by American equipment an logistics. My personal opinion is that America, France, etc. will join in the future, but will weigh doing so against the outcomes & consequences of the Polish-led coalition (assuming they do go in).
Belarus denies these claims, but they have been facilitating the transfer of Russian equipment & soldiers through their country. U.S. Officials also support the claim. https://kyivindependent.com/national/sources-belarus-to-join-russias-war-on-ukraine-within-hours/ https://www.jpost.com/breaking-news/article-700998 https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/news/defence/us-official-belarus-may-join-ukraine-invasion/articleshow/89886273.cms https://www.repubblica.it/esteri/2022/03/20/news/ucraina__russia_le_news_di_oggi_dalla_guerra-342062199/ Polling, though biased, shows that the vast majority of Belarusians oppose the war (survey was taken March 11). https://censor.net/ua/news/3327128/kilkist_bilorusiv_yaki_ne_pidtrymuyut_uchasti_u_viyini_proty_ukrayiny_zrosla_do_97_doslidjennya People (as far as we know, Belarusians themselves) have been sabotaging Belarusian railways to stall the progress. Several arrests have been made. https://www.voiceofbelarus.org/belarus-news/the-rail-war-and-rail-partisans-in-belarus/ SPECULATION: There are probably orders to join in the invasion, but met by such stiff resistance among Belarusians is making difficult if not impossible.
The exercises were originally planned for December. The exercises include over 30,000 troops from 27 member nations, more than double the previously planned amount. This includes faux air battles, troop deployment exercises, etc. https://www.arctictoday.com/nato-arctic-exercises-get-under-way-in-norway/ https://www.gov.uk/government/news/uk-armed-forces-join-largest-arctic-exercise-in-30-years Russia, of course, is poking the bear. https://thebarentsobserver.com/en/security/2022/03/russian-navy-announces-shootings-west-natos-ongoing-major-arctic-exercise
https://kyivindependent.com/uncategorized/ukraines-military-over-15000-russian-troops-killed-since-feb-24/
He is widely respected internationally, and given the severity of russian oppression against dissent, this is a ballsy move. When resigning from his position as chairman of the russian heroes club, he condemns Putin's "slaughter of Slavic brothers". https://www.msn.com/en-gb/news/world/hero-of-russian-federation-resigns-with-damning-note-denouncing-putin-s-slaughter-of-slavic-brothers/ar-AAUTMyc https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/europe/russia-federation-pilot-alexander-garnaev-b2033247.html
Shane Matthew, 34, a British veteran who served two tours in Afghanistan and is now helping train fighters in Ukraine, told The Times of London that Russian forces appeared to be “tactically inferior” to the Ukrainians. “The Taliban would do a better job... There’s no way they could encircle Kyiv,” Matthew said. https://www.businessinsider.com/veteran-in-ukraine-taliban-would-do-better-than-russia-military-2022-3 https://digitalcoloradonews.com/ex-british-army-sniper-who-served-in-afghanistan-and-is-now-volunteering-in-ukraine-says-the-taliban-were-better-fighters-than-russian-soldiers-report-says/ https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-10610997/Ukraine-war-Veteran-British-sniper-joined-Lads-Army-says-Kyiv-never-fall-Russians.html For those that want to make donations to help Ukrainians, see the lists below. If you have additional (preferably *better*) places to donate, please let me know so I can check them out before adding to my posts. Before making donations, always be sure to read on where/how the donation money is spent. Humanitarian aid: https://www.unicef.org/ukraine/en http://r2p.org.ua/en/ https://www.hias.org/ https://www.pah.org.pl/en/ Military aid: https://bank.gov.ua/ua/news/all/natsionalniy-bank-vidkriv-spetsrahunok-dlya-zboru-koshtiv-na-potrebi-armiyi https://www.portmone.com.ua/r3/uk/terminal/index/index/id/118103 Multipurpose (some funds MAY be used by military) aid: https://razomforukraine.org/ https://kse.ua/support/donation/
item.dc:creator: VikingWeightlifting

item.description: Wow, FP edit...I didn't bother putting and commentary originally because my paint posts don't get too far. To answer some questions, it's acrylic, mostly Gaffrey Art Materials, and Liquitex Gels to thicken. Takes about 2-3 days to fully dry. No I'm not rich but appreciate those commenting who understand the cost of just making a painting like this (since I have friends who think I should just give them my works for free). Thank you imgur fam.
item.dc:creator: harleyamy

item.title: It's a cool idea, but ...
item.description: ... adults in 2022 would just read a 'How to Act Like You Read 12 Books' article on WikiHow and scam Pizza Hut. Now if they changed the rules so you actually had to get your mom to sign it ... or if you don't have a Mom, the local librarian ... FP Edit - Yay, front page! Where's my pan pizza?? I decided to create some fun stuff for people to do - I'm actually working on a really cool 'Summer Vacation for Adults' project. Meanwhile, please feel welcomed to try something I just created: Interactive Top Tens - 90s Internet-style fun! https://inkican.com/interactive-inkican/
item.dc:creator: inkican
